meta.description: Data lineage disclosure for Risk Space MCP (FSA R3 compliance)

sources: NPA prefectural crime CSV (22 prefectures, 492 files)
risk_score.transformation: KDE (Gaussian kernel, h=250m Silverman) + severity weighting + exponential temporal decay (tau=180d crime, 30d traffic)
known_issues: 25 prefectures use municipality-centroid synthetic points (inflated local uncertainty)

sources: OSM Overpass API (convenience stores, hospitals, pharmacies)
p_escape.transformation: Distance-weighted haven proximity: P(escape) = 1 - exp(-sum(alpha_k / d_k))
known_issues: Expert-estimated weights (not derived from outcome data)
Walking-network distance approximated by Euclidean in some areas
Composite risk index, NOT calibrated probability
Formal hold-out validation not yet conducted (v1.0)

avg_severity.transformation: Weighted mean of event severities within grid cell

dynamic_multipliers.update_frequency: weather: ~30min, events: daily, temporal: static model
known_issues: Temporal multipliers based on literature patterns, not dataset-specific

haven_count_500m.transformation: Count of safe haven features within 500m Euclidean radius

safety_rank.transformation: Percentile-based grading: S(top 10%), A(10-30%), B(30-55%), C(55-80%), D(bottom 20%)
known_issues: Thresholds are relative (change with each data refresh)

realtime_slim.display_name: リアルタイム不審者情報
sources: Gaccom Safety Navi (ガッコム安全ナビ)
Keishicho Mail (警視庁メールけいしちょう)
realtime_slim.normalization: Compact array format [lat, lon, subtype, severity, date]
known_issues: Reporting bias: ~14% reporting rate for chikan (NPA 2023)
